hero.title: Anath Shiksha Foundation
hero.subtitle: Transforming Lives Through Education, Compassion & Hope
hero.tagline: Every child deserves a bright future — we make it possible.

about.description: Anath Shiksha Foundation is a registered NGO dedicated to uplifting the most vulnerable sections of society. Founded with a vision of an equitable India, we work tirelessly to ensure that no orphan, no hungry child, no village student, and no underprivileged girl is left behind. Through education, nutrition, mentorship, and community support, we are writing stories of hope every day.
about.vision: An India where every child — regardless of background — grows up educated, nourished, and empowered.
about.mission: To provide free quality education in top schools to orphaned children, nutritious meals to the needy, career mentorship to village youth, and dignified marriage support to poor girls.

programs.title: Free Education in Top Schools
programs.description: We sponsor complete schooling — from Class 1 to Class 12 — for orphaned children in CBSE and ICSE schools. This includes admission fees, uniforms, books, stationery, and extra-curricular activities.

programs.title: Feed the Needy
programs.description: Our daily meal programs run across 85+ villages and urban slums. We distribute nutritious meals twice a day, ensuring that no child sleeps hungry. Our nutrition camps address acute malnutrition.

programs.title: Mentorship for Village Students
programs.description: We connect rural students with professionals, IIT/IIM alumni, and industry mentors. Our programs include career counselling, digital literacy, NEET/JEE coaching support, and skill development workshops.

programs.title: Poor Girls Marriage Support
programs.description: We provide dignified marriage assistance — including financial support, venue, essentials and legal documentation — to girls from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families, so their families don't fall into debt.

testimonials.name: Ravi Kumar
testimonials.quote: I lost my parents at age 6. Anath Shiksha Foundation gave me a family, an education, and a future. Today I want to become a doctor.

testimonials.name: Meera Devi
testimonials.quote: Because of the mentorship program, I cracked NEET this year. First person from my village to study medicine!

testimonials.name: Suresh Patel
testimonials.quote: I donate every month because I've seen the impact first-hand. These children are transformed. This foundation truly changes lives.

ceo.name: Abhinav Singh
ceo.bio: Abhinav Singh founded Anath Shiksha Foundation with a simple belief: no child should be denied education because of circumstances beyond their control. Under his leadership, the foundation has grown from a small local initiative to a pan-India movement impacting thousands of lives.

scholarship.title: Anath Shiksha Scholarship Program
scholarship.description: We believe every brilliant child deserves a chance — regardless of financial background. Our annual scholarship exam identifies the brightest students from underprivileged families and awards them full scholarships to pursue their dreams.

exams.name: ASF Junior Scholar
exams.description: For middle school students from BPL / OBC / SC / ST families. Top 50 rankers receive full scholarship for the academic year.

exams.name: ASF Senior Scholar
exams.subjects: Maths, Science, Social Studies, English, Reasoning
exams.description: For high school students. Top 30 rankers receive scholarship + mentorship by IIT/NIT alumni.

exams.name: ASF Merit Excellence
exams.subjects: Physics, Chemistry, Maths / Biology + English + Aptitude
exams.description: For senior secondary students targeting engineering or medical. Top 20 receive full scholarship + coaching support.

eligibility: Student must be from a family with annual income below ₹2,50,000
Student should be studying in a government or low-fee private school
Orphaned children get 10 bonus marks automatically
80% attendance in last academic year required
One application per student per year
process: Fill the online application form below
Receive exam hall ticket on your email/phone
Appear for the written exam at your nearest center
Results announced — top rankers receive scholarship certificate
Scholarship amount transferred directly to student's bank account
